subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath adorned the world with the lights of His firm Command and hath manifested that which He desired for the advancement of the nations, bidding them to submission [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی زین العالم بأنوار امره المحکم و اظهر ما اراد لارتقاء الامم و امرهم بالخضوع
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @Shrines and Holy places, @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
